name: Horror Tale 3: The Witch
short_description: Fight the scary witch in the most terrifying chapter of Tom's adventures!
detailed_description:
In this episode you will come face to face with Wanda the Witch, and also meet new friends. You will open many completely new locations, and learn more about the past of the terrible child kidnapper, which will lead you to new frightening discoveries. On the way to the goal, puzzles, moments of horror, unexpected turns and a lot of fun await you! 😃🤘🏻

The story will develop rapidly and very unpredictably. This horror game is an exciting, fun, and scary adventure to the neighborhood of America of the '90s! 👍

Features of the adventure puzzle game Horror Tale 3:

★ Mysterious and fascinating story

★ Scary antagonist that will make you scream and interesting neighbor characters

★ Puzzles, riddles, and items to search

★ 5 diverse locations

★ Nice stylized graphics

★ Original author's soundtrack

😈 Immerse with your friends and neighbors into a thrilling entertaining adventure in our multi-part horror series!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Indonesian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
